  * ### What is Prisma 2?
    * Next-generation [[ORM]] for [[Node.js]] and [[TypeScript]]
    * Prisma helps app developers build faster and make fewer errors with an open source ORM for PostgreSQL, MySQL and SQLite
  * ### Parts of Prisma
    * **Prisma Client** - Auto-generated and type-safe query builder for Node.js & TypeScript
    * **Prisma Migrate** - Migration system
    * **Prisma Studio** - GUI to view and edit data in your database
  * The main part of Prisma 2 is it is own [[Prisma Schema File]]
  * ## Prisma Presentation Notes
    * [[Prisma 2 - Presentation Notes]]
